examples.title: Basic Formatted Output with Manipulators
examples.description: Demonstrates fundamental I/O manipulators in C++
examples.explanation: Shows base conversion using dec, oct, hex manipulators, floating-point formatting with fixed and scientific, and field width with setw and setfill.

examples.title: Table Formatted Output
examples.description: Creates a formatted table with proper alignment and spacing
examples.explanation: Creates a formatted table using setw for column widths, setfill for borders, and left/right for alignment within columns.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is number of rows

examples.title: Boolean Formatting
examples.description: Demonstrates boolalpha and other boolean formatting options
examples.explanation: Shows how boolalpha displays true/false instead of 1/0, and noboolalpha reverts to numeric display.

examples.title: Format Flags Manipulation
examples.description: Shows how to set, reset, and manipulate format flags
examples.explanation: Demonstrates using member functions setf(), unsetf(), and flags() to manipulate format flags programmatically.
